policy.source: src/wernerColors.json stores a reviewed semantic transcription of the printed table and component-parts wording.
policy.normalized: The application applies only the rules and overrides below for screen display.
policy.auditRequirement: Every source/display difference must be produced by this ledger and covered by tests.
policy.scope: The semantic transcription is not a diplomatic facsimile: source layout, line breaks, W. attribution marks, and incidental typography are outside the current text model.

sourceCorrections.correction: Restored the printed spelling "chesnut" where the prior transcription silently used "chestnut".
Restored the terminal period in "Egg of Grey Linnet."
Removed the inserted article before "blackish lead grey" and restored the source comma after "lustre".
Corrected transcription "Celadine Green" to printed "Celindine Green".
Restored the omitted sentence explaining that characteristic blue, red, and yellow colours ought to be pure.
Restored the apostrophe printed in the component-parts heading "King's Yellow".
Corrected transcription "Anhers of Saffron Grocus" to printed "Anthers of Saffron Crocus".
Corrected malformed transcription "Chocoloate Red is" to printed "Chocolate Red, is".
Restored the printed spelling "Chesnut Brown" and "Chesnuts."
Corrected transcription "Rok Cristal" to printed "Rock Cristal".

normalizationRules.reason: Modern spelling for screen display; printed source spelling remains available.
Modern spelling for screen display; printed source spelling remains available.
normalizationRules.evidence: Getty scan leaf 73 and printed page 45

normalizationOverrides.source: Pale Bluish Purple, is lavender purple mixed with a little red and black.
normalizationOverrides.normalized: Pale Blackish Purple, is lavender purple mixed with a little red and black.
normalizationOverrides.reason: The component-parts heading conflicts with the table name; display follows the table name.
normalizationOverrides.evidence: Getty scan leaf 45 and printed page 34

normalizationOverrides.reason: The table omits the apostrophe; the component-parts heading prints it.
normalizationOverrides.evidence: Getty scan leaf 56 and printed page 39

normalizationOverrides.reason: The printed table uses "converts"; display uses the ornithological term "coverts".

normalizationOverrides.source: Olive Brown, is ash grey mixed with a little blue, red, and chesnut brown.
normalizationOverrides.normalized: Clove Brown, is ash grey mixed with a little blue, red, and chestnut brown.
normalizationOverrides.reason: The component-parts heading says "Olive Brown" while the table identifies No. 109 as "Clove Brown"; display follows the table name.
normalizationOverrides.evidence: Getty scan leaf 73 and printed page 46
